label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 2

extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won sprint in Burgos by choosing left barrier while Jakobsen went right after both lost leadout trains in compressed finale.
tactical_patterns: Astana overcooked intermediate sprint for Roglic green jersey, allowing Jakobsen opportunistic points take despite not contesting.
Peloton rode unusually wide formation on zigzag roads, creating leadout chaos where Matthews/Trentin navigated best until final 200m.
Late-race crash outside 3km zone eliminated Bora's entire sprint train, revealing vulnerability of single leadout structure.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: Navigated leadout chaos independently, choosing barrier line opposite Jakobsen showing spatial awareness without team support
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: Opportunistically took intermediate sprint points without effort when Astana mistimed Roglic's leadout
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: Third place without visible leadout suggests diesel engine works better in disorganized compressed sprints
rider_signals.TRENTIN Mattia: positive: UAE's Milano leadout with Trentin navigated zigzag course best until overtaken, showing Trentin's classics skill translates
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: Astana burned energy chasing green jersey intermediate but went too early, questionable GC team resource allocation
